name: Liz's Christmas Candy Cane Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together butter, powdered sugar, egg, and extracts.
2. Stir in sifted flour and salt until combined.
3. Divide the dough into two halves. Blend red food coloring into one half of the dough.
4. Cover both pieces of dough and refrigerate for 4 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
6. Roll out 1 teaspoon of dough from each half on a lightly floured surface into 4-inch ropes.
7. Place one red and one white rope side by side; press together lightly and twist.
8. Place the twisted ropes on an ungreased cookie sheet, forming the shape of a cane.
9. Bake for 9 minutes. Watch closely as they have a tendency to brown quickly.
